close_reason: Style: refresh() delegation to get() is explicit and clear per-backend
description: secretx-env/src/lib.rs:62-64 'async fn refresh(&self) -> ... { self.get().await }' is a no-op forwarder because env vars have no caching layer to bypass. Most read-only backends without a cache will write the same forwarder. Consider giving SecretStore::refresh a default implementation in secretx-core { fn refresh -> { self.get() } } so that backends without a cache layer do not need to repeat this. This is a cross-crate change (lives in secretx-core), filed here for visibility under the env crate's epic. Filed as opinion-tier — the current explicit form is also defensible, since it forces every implementor to think about whether their backend has a cache.
title: refresh() blind-forwards to get() — consider a default impl in the trait
